title: justicia cheiranthifolia
intro: Justicia cheiranthifolia, also known as the 'Butterfly Pea' or 'Kalanchoe-like Plant', is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and infections due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Justicia cheiranthifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and promote cardiovascular health. The plant's leaves can be made into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, and its flowers are also used as a natural food coloring and in traditional medicine preparations.
